title: MOBILE HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: LA CLINICA MOBILE HEALTH SERVICES MOBILE HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Mobile Health Center is a 38-foot clinic on wheels that provides basic medical, emergency dental, and behavioral health care. Nurse practitioners, medical assistants, and dental staff work on the vehicle, which includes medical exam areas, a full dental suite, an office area, a lab, and a restroom. The medical and dental exam areas can be enclosed to provide privacy for patients. Some vaccinations including flu vaccine, is available. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Email (541) 512-3922 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (541) 512-3922 Weekly Schedule Updates Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk-ins only. Patients are served on a first-come, first-served basis. Check mobile health schedule on website. FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees based on income and family size for patients with no health insurance. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Saturday, varied hours and locations Services: Childhood Immunization Emergency Dental Care Flu Vaccines Mobile Health Care Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LA CLINICA MOBILE HEALTH SERVICES
